-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.categories
(
    category_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    category_name character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'::character varying,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT categories_pkey PRIMARY KEY (category_id),
    CONSTRAINT categories_name_unique UNIQUE (category_name)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.channel_allocation_logs
(
    log_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    channel character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SHOPEE'::character varying,
    inventory_id uuid NOT NULL,
    direction character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    quantity integer NOT NULL,
    movement_id uuid,
    created_by uuid,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT channel_allocation_logs_pkey PRIMARY KEY (log_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.channel_sku_mappings
(
    mapping_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    channel character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SHOPEE'::character varying,
    external_sku character varying(120) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    external_item_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    inventory_id uuid NOT NULL,
    created_by uuid,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT channel_sku_mappings_pkey PRIMARY KEY (mapping_id),
    CONSTRAINT channel_sku_mappings_unique UNIQUE (channel, external_sku)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.channel_stock_snapshots
(
    snapshot_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    channel character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SHOPEE'::character varying,
    inventory_id uuid NOT NULL,
    baseline_qty integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    allocated_qty integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    last_synced_at timestamp with time zone,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT channel_stock_snapshots_pkey PRIMARY KEY (snapshot_id),
    CONSTRAINT channel_stock_snapshots_unique UNIQUE (channel, inventory_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.integration_clients
(
    client_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    system_code character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    display_name character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    description character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    webhook_url character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    api_base_path character varying(120) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT '/api/v1/integrations'::character varying,
    status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'::character varying,
    last_request_at timestamp with time zone,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    api_key_hash character varying(64) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    api_key_prefix character varying(24) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    api_key_created_at timestamp with time zone,
    api_key_expires_at timestamp with time zone,
    CONSTRAINT integration_clients_pkey PRIMARY KEY (client_id),
    CONSTRAINT integration_clients_system_code_key UNIQUE (system_code)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.inventory
(
    inventory_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    sku character varying(64) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    item_name character varying(180) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    stocks integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    category_id uuid NOT NULL,
    variation character varying(180) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    price numeric(12, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    low_stock_threshold integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
    lifecycle_status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'::character varying,
    status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" GENERATED ALWAYS AS (
CASE
    WHEN ((lifecycle_status)::text = 'INACTIVE'::text) THEN 'INACTIVE'::text
    WHEN (stocks = 0) THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK'::text
    WHEN (stocks <= low_stock_threshold) THEN 'LOW_STOCK'::text
    ELSE 'ACTIVE'::text
END) STORED,
    created_by uuid,
    updated_by uuid,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    archived_at timestamp with time zone,
    uniform_gender character varying(10) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    uniform_type character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    uniform_size character varying(10) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT inventory_pkey PRIMARY KEY (inventory_id),
    CONSTRAINT inventory_sku_unique UNIQUE (sku)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.inventory.uniform_gender
    IS 'Uniform variant gender (Male/Female/Unisex). NULL for non-uniform items.';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.inventory.uniform_type
    IS 'Uniform variant type (Polo/Short/Shirt/Pants). NULL for non-uniform items.';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.inventory.uniform_size
    IS 'Uniform variant size (XS..5XL). NULL for non-uniform items.';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.inventory_bundle_components
(
    component_row_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    bundle_inventory_id uuid NOT NULL,
    component_category_id uuid NOT NULL,
    component_inventory_id uuid,
    quantity integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT inventory_bundle_components_pkey PRIMARY KEY (component_row_id),
    CONSTRAINT inventory_bundle_components_quantity_check CHECK (quantity = 1),
    CONSTRAINT inventory_bundle_components_shape CHECK (
      component_inventory_id IS NULL
      OR component_inventory_id <> bundle_inventory_id
    )
);

COMMENT ON TABLE public.inventory_bundle_components
    IS 'Learning Kit BOM: category slots only. Concrete inventory items are chosen on the stock request. Quantity is always 1 on the recipe.';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.inventory_bundle_components.component_category_id
    IS 'Category included in the kit. Required for every BOM row.';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.inventory_bundle_components.component_inventory_id
    IS 'Deprecated for new kits (always NULL). Concrete SKUs are resolved from stock_request_components.';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.stock_request_components
(
    request_component_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    request_id uuid NOT NULL,
    category_name character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    gender character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    item_type character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    size_label character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    item_name character varying(180) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    quantity integer NOT NULL,
    inventory_id uuid,
    matched_sku character varying(64) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    failure_reason character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT stock_request_components_pkey PRIMARY KEY (request_component_id)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE public.stock_request_components
    IS 'Per-request component specs for Learning Kits (gender/type/size or item name). Resolved and deducted on approve.';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.online_order_items
(
    order_item_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    order_id uuid NOT NULL,
    external_sku character varying(120) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    external_item_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    external_variation character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    quantity integer NOT NULL,
    unit_price numeric(12, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    line_status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNMATCHED'::character varying,
    matched_inventory_id uuid,
    matched_sku character varying(64) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    movement_id uuid,
    failure_reason character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT online_order_items_pkey PRIMARY KEY (order_item_id),
    CONSTRAINT online_order_items_line_unique UNIQUE (order_id, external_sku, external_variation)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.online_orders
(
    order_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    channel character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SHOPEE'::character varying,
    external_order_id character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    order_status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RECEIVED'::character varying,
    buyer_name character varying(150) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    order_placed_at timestamp with time zone,
    total_amount numeric(12, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    source character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CSV_IMPORT'::character varying,
    imported_by uuid,
    notes character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    fulfillment_status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PROCESSING'::character varying,
    return_reusable boolean,
    return_notes character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT online_orders_pkey PRIMARY KEY (order_id),
    CONSTRAINT online_orders_external_unique UNIQUE (channel, external_order_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.schema_migrations
(
    filename text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    applied_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT schema_migrations_pkey PRIMARY KEY (filename)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.stock_movements
(
    movement_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    inventory_id uuid NOT NULL,
    movement_type character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    quantity integer NOT NULL,
    stock_delta integer NOT NULL,
    previous_stock integer NOT NULL,
    new_stock integer NOT NULL,
    reference_number character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    remarks character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_by uuid NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT stock_movements_pkey PRIMARY KEY (movement_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.stock_requests
(
    request_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    source_system character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PSMS'::character varying,
    external_reference character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    request_date date NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    requested_by character varying(150) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    reason character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    category_name character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    gender character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    item_type character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    size_label character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    quantity integer NOT NULL,
    status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING'::character varying,
    inventory_id uuid,
    matched_sku character varying(64) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    movement_id uuid,
    webhook_url character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    rejection_reason character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    failure_reason character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    processed_by uuid,
    processed_at timestamp with time zone,
    webhook_last_status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    webhook_last_attempt_at timestamp with time zone,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT stock_requests_pkey PRIMARY KEY (request_id),
    CONSTRAINT stock_requests_external_ref_unique UNIQUE (source_system, external_reference)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users
(
    user_id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    firebase_uid character varying(128) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    email character varying(254) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    full_name character varying(150) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    status character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'::character varying,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    role character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ADMIN'::character varying,
    CONSTRAINT users_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id),
    CONSTRAINT users_email_unique UNIQUE (email),
    CONSTRAINT users_firebase_uid_key UNIQUE (firebase_uid)
);

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.channel_allocation_logs
    ADD CONSTRAINT channel_allocation_logs_created_by_fkey FOREIGN KEY (created_by)

    ON DELETE NO ACTION;

    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.channel_sku_mappings

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_channel_stock_snapshots_inventory

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.inventory

    ON DELETE NO ACTION;

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.inventory_bundle_components
    ADD CONSTRAINT inventory_bundle_components_bundle_fkey FOREIGN KEY (bundle_inventory_id)

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.inventory_bundle_components

    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_bundle_components_category
    ON public.inventory_bundle_components(component_category_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.inventory_bundle_components
    ADD CONSTRAINT inventory_bundle_components_component_fkey FOREIGN KEY (component_inventory_id)

    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_bundle_components_component

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.stock_movements
